description_long: This ornate sconce features a central stem with five gracefully curved arms radiating outward, each supporting a cup-shaped light holder. The arms are adorned with hanging teardrop-shaped crystal ornaments, adding a touch of elegance and sparkle. The main structure appears to be crafted from glass or crystal, with a glossy, reflective finish that enhances its luxurious appearance. The light holders are tulip-shaped and likely designed to house individual bulbs, contributing to a classic chandelier-like aesthetic. The overall design is symmetrical and balanced, with decorative flourishes that evoke a vintage or baroque style. This fixture is intended to be mounted on a ceiling, making it a striking centerpiece for upscale urban interiors.
description: A luxurious, vintage-style ceiling sconce with five tulip-shaped light holders, curved arms, and hanging crystal ornaments.
description_view_0: Frontal view showing all five light holders and the symmetrical arrangement of the arms and crystal ornaments.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting three of the light holders and the curvature of the arms, with some crystal ornaments visible.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, displaying all five light holders and the full spread of the arms and crystals.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing three light holders and the elegant arm design.
attribute_fixture_design: Vintage and ornate, this fixture features curved arms, tulip-shaped holders, and hanging crystals, reminiscent of classic baroque chandeliers.
